svg.title: DL Canvas — AttnRes
svg.desc: Deep Learning Canvas for the Attention Residuals project, covering architecture, residual strategy, training dynamics, regularisation, compute budget, evaluation, inference efficiency, failure modes, and pre-training transfer.

g.text: Embedding → [AttnResTransformerLayer × depth] → RMSNorm → head · Vision: PatchEmbed + mean-pool · LM: tok+pos embed, weight-tied head
Components: RMSNorm · SwiGLU (dim × 8/3) · RotaryEmbedding (RoPE) · CausalSelfAttention (Flash Attn, is_causal=True) · no bias anywhere

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the AttnRes residual strategy vs standard residuals')
sendPrompt('What training dynamics does AttnRes exhibit?')
sendPrompt('What are the compute requirements for AttnRes?')
sendPrompt('How does AttnRes relate to pre-training and transfer learning?')
sendPrompt('How efficient is AttnRes at inference time?')
sendPrompt('How is AttnRes evaluated at the DL level?')
sendPrompt('What failure modes does AttnRes address or introduce?')
g.text: Addressed: PreNorm dilution — h magnitudes grow O(L) under std residuals
Addressed: uniform depth aggregation — earlier layers buried, can be pruned
Addressed: irreversible loss — info lost at aggregation unrecoverable in std res.
Watch: pipeline parallelism memory — Full AttnRes needs O(L·d); use Block AttnRes
Watch: block_size sensitivity — ablate block_size=2,4,8 for target architecture
Watch: domain transfer — gains confirmed on image + LM; measure on new tasks
Mitigated: gradient instability — RMSNorm on keys + softmax normalisation

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What are the key design choices that make AttnRes work?')
g.text: 1 learned vector w_l per layer (not full QKV — lightweight) · RMSNorm on keys (magnitude-safe) · softmax over depth (bounded, sums to 1)
Block grouping N≈8 (O(N·d) memory) · two AttnRes ops per layer (before attn AND before MLP) · no bias on any Linear

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the duality between depth-wise and sequence-wise attention')
g.text: RNNs over sequences → Transformers (attention replaces recurrence) · Standard residuals over depth → AttnRes (attention replaces fixed accumulation)
